# afavers

> afavers is a personal job application tracker for people searching for work in Germany. It helps users find jobs, save opportunities, track applications, follow up, and export a clean job-search record.

## What afavers does

- Fetches jobs from German job sources and stores them in Supabase
- Lets users save jobs and track applications through a pipeline
- Supports saved, preparing, applied, follow-up, interviewing, offered, rejected, and archived stages
- Provides PDF, Excel, and CSV exports for job-search reports
- Includes a browser extension for saving jobs from external sites
- Offers Hot Picks, a swipe-style job triage flow
- Includes English-language filtering for international applicants
- Provides reminders for interviews and follow-ups
- Supports English and German

## Who it is for

International job seekers, graduates, students, and anyone who wants a clearer job application tracker for Germany.

## Key pages

- Landing / home: https://afavers.online/
- Live demo: https://afavers.online/demo
- Register: https://afavers.online/register
- Login: https://afavers.online/login
- Disclaimer / legal: https://afavers.online/disclaimer

## Technology

- Frontend: React, TypeScript, Vite, Tailwind CSS
- Hosting: Vercel
- Auth: Supabase Auth
- Database: Supabase Postgres
- Backend tasks: Supabase Edge Functions and Supabase Cron
- Extension: Chrome and Firefox browser extension

## Contact

Website: https://afavers.online
